comment: Demo #9 skills agent. trigger -> llm_call(skills_path) -> log. The corpus dir is injected by replacing skills_path with the materialized corpus dir at run_dag time (handler sets config.skills_path). The model sees only the catalog (name+description per pack) and calls load_skill(name[, reference]) to pull a pack overview or a nested reference leaf (reference='rates/eu' descends one level). Navigation is progressive: overview -> reference -> nested leaf. model/api_key/db resolve from env. connection_url is popped at runtime (single-call, avoids pool contention) mirroring codeexec_agent.json.

config.system_message: You are a finance analyst answering one question about an orders dataset. You have a catalog of knowledge packs; each pack may have nested references. Call load_skill(name) to read a pack overview, then load_skill(name, reference) (e.g. reference='rates/eu') to pull the specific table you need. Find the policy that applies, apply its exact rule and numbers, and return ONLY the final number.
